title: Silverhook BIGK1 Big Boy Glass Fibre Resin Repair Kit
description: From the manufacturer Big Boy Fibre Glass Repair Kit Kit Includes Approx. 16" x 24" Matting 242g resin 20g hardener 1x brush 1x spreader 1x disposable gloves Silverhook Big Boy Glass Fibre Resin Repair Kit is suitable for repair on a variety of materials such as brick, metal, plastic, wood aluminium, glass fibre etc. Strong adhesion to metal. Large hardness with high elasticity. Minimal shrinkage. Good sanding properties. Big Boy Lightweight Body Filler Big Boy Ultra Fine Body Filler Big Boy Metal Filler Big Boy Plastic Flexi Filler Big Boy Epoxy Pro Filler Big Boy High Temperature Metal Filler Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 209 4.6 out of 5 stars 5,290 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,242 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,105 — 4.5 out of 5 stars 199 Feature Easy Application Excellent sanding properties Contains Aluminium Particles Easy application High Elasticity Flexible and superior adhesion Feature Excellent Sanding Properties Grips onto metal, wood, Bridging fillers, concrete, and PVCs. Excellent Thermal Conductivity Excellent sanding properties Strong Grip Excellent sanding properties Feature High Elasticity and Gripping Ability Easy to use Ultra Tough, Easy Sanding High elasticity & gripping ability Grips to Wide Range of Surfaces Can be applied over bare steel, galvanised steel & aluminium Feature Corrosion Resistant Corrosion resistant Corrosion resistant Corrosion resistant Corrosion & Water Resistant Powder Coatable Feature General Purpose Filler on Wood, Metal, and Rigid Plastics. Perfect exterior filler for areas requiring a paint finish e.g. window frames, walls, car body panels, etc. For application on surfaces that are subject to vibrations and frequent temperature changes For the repair of dented or damaged plastic bumpers Perfect exterior filler on areas requiring a paint finish E.G. Window frames, walls, etc. For application on surfaces that are subject to high temperature up to 200°C Big Boy Carbon Fibre Flexi Filler Big Boy Carbon Fibre Flexi Filler is a lightweight flexible polyester putty filler with carbon and glass fibre for added strength. This low weight putty can be used to fill large dents and holes in metals and plastics. Carbon Fibre Flexi Filler has a working time of 5-6 minutes ( at 20°c) and a curing time of 30-45 (at 20°c). Available in 250ml & 600ml
